contentPillars.name: Equity Research & Stock Recommendations
contentPillars.purpose: Deliver data‑driven analysis and actionable stock ideas that align with PL’s brokerage and portfolio‑management services.
exampleTopics: Technical vs. fundamental analysis case studies

contentPillars.name: Market & Macro Outlook
contentPillars.purpose: Provide clients and prospects with forward‑looking commentary on Indian macro‑economics, policy changes, and market sentiment.
exampleTopics: Impact of RBI policy shifts on equity markets
Geopolitical events affecting Indian capital flows

contentPillars.name: Wealth Management & Financial Planning
contentPillars.purpose: Educate HNI and mass‑affluent investors on holistic wealth‑building strategies that complement PL’s advisory and portfolio‑management offerings.
exampleTopics: Retirement corpus planning using SIPs and ULIPs
Risk‑adjusted portfolio construction for different life stages

contentPillars.name: Product & Service Education
contentPillars.purpose: Showcase PL’s proprietary tools, brokerage platforms, and value‑added services to drive adoption and cross‑sell.
exampleTopics: How to use PL’s online trading dashboard
Benefits of PL’s discretionary portfolio management

contentPillars.name: Client Success Stories & Thought Leadership
contentPillars.purpose: Build trust by highlighting real‑world outcomes and positioning PL’s senior analysts as industry experts.
exampleTopics: Case study: 30% portfolio growth for a HNI client
Interview with PL’s Chief Investment Officer on market trends

repurposingPlan: Turn each quarterly research report into a series of blog posts, LinkedIn articles, and carousel infographics.
Extract key data points from webinars to create short video clips for YouTube Shorts and Twitter.
Convert market‑outlook articles into downloadable PDFs for email lead magnets.
Summarise client success stories into testimonial graphics for Instagram and LinkedIn.
Reuse macro‑analysis charts across newsletters, website dashboards, and partner portal snippets.

reviewChecklist: Fact‑check all data points against PL’s internal research database and regulatory filings.
Legal sign‑off for compliance with SEBI and RBI advertising guidelines (no guaranteed returns).
Brand voice audit – ensure tone aligns with PL’s trusted, professional image.
SEO & keyword validation for web‑published content.
Performance KPI review (engagement, click‑through, lead generation) before next content cycle.
